input.question: How many paid volunteer hours can an employee use each year?

docs.title: Volunteer Benefit
docs.text: Employees may use 16 paid volunteer hours per calendar year with manager approval.

docs.title: Remote Work
docs.text: Remote employees should keep their working location current in the HR portal.

docs.title: Travel Cards
docs.text: Travel cards are issued after finance approval.

input.question: What port and protocol should the webhook receiver use?

docs.title: Batch Jobs
docs.text: Nightly batch jobs start at 02:00 UTC.

docs.title: Webhook Receiver
docs.text: The webhook receiver must listen on port 443 and require HTTPS for all inbound callbacks.

docs.title: Metrics
docs.text: Service metrics are exported every 30 seconds.

docs.title: Expense Reports
docs.text: Expense reports are due within 10 business days of the receipt date.

docs.title: Vendor Payments
docs.text: Vendor payment batches run each Thursday.

docs.title: Budget Reviews
docs.text: Budget reviews happen at the start of each quarter.

input.question: Which team owns customer data deletion requests?

docs.title: On-call
docs.text: The platform team owns production on-call rotation.

docs.title: Data Deletion
docs.text: Privacy operations owns customer data deletion requests and must respond within five business days.
